content.text:
<timestamp>Wednesday, Jul 22, 2026, 2:17 PM (UTC+9)</timestamp>
<user_query>
Review intelligence-related docs in `F:/hysys tools/hysys-CDU-assist/docs/` for CDU readiness after a product name rebrand to CDU Assist.

Focus on:
- INTELLIGENCE_INVENTORY_V1.md
- MULTI_VARIABLE_ITERATION_MAP.md
- expert_decision_workflow.md (esp States A-F and variable families)
- column_convergence_playbook.md
- intelligence_improvement_notes.md
- SCOPE_CDU_ASSIST.md / CASE_CDU_V1_NEW_INTELLIGENCE.md (intelligence sections only)
- hysys_add_spec_catalog.md

For each: what intelligence is coded vs paper, what is still SW Stripper / simple-column physics, what must change for atmospheric CDU (side draws, PAs, cut points, multi-spec DOF).

Return a concise structured inventory: KEEP (generic PE), RETARGET (needs CDU examples), REPLACE (wrong for CDU), MISSING (CDU gaps).
</user_query>
I'll review the listed intelligence docs and classify each item as KEEP / RETARGET / REPLACE / MISSING for atmospheric CDU readiness.
Reading the key docs in parallel for coded-vs-paper and CDU gaps.
Checking a few internal contradictions and whether CDU-specific knobs appear anywhere.

input.final_summary: Rebrand renamed the docs to CDU Assist, but most executable intelligence is still SW Stripper / 2-product physics. Keep generic PE (States A–F, FINAL_TARGET lock, one-family trials). Retarget families and examples for side draws / PAs / cuts. Replace NH₃–RR heuristics and “CDU logic out of scope.” Missing: multi-product FINAL_TARGETs, PA/draw families, assay property targets, and a CDU playbook.

content.text:
## Verdict

Docs are **rebranded to CDU Assist** but intelligence is still mostly **SW Stripper / 2-product**. Product identity says atmospheric CDU; coded PE and examples still assume Full Reflux + RR + bottoms NH₃.

---

### Cross-cutting coded vs paper

| Layer | Status | Physics |
|-------|--------|---------|
| COM inspect / GoalValue / IsActive / snapshot / Trial Map | **CODED** | Generic |
| States A–E, FINAL_TARGET lock, keep/reverse, bottoms operability | **CODED** (thin) | Generic PE; validated on stripper |
| Family chooser A/B/C (not RR-only) | **CODED / claimed** | Still 2-product knobs |
| State F | **PARTIAL** — inventory contradicts itself (§4 “never returns F” vs §9 “CODED”) | Generic |
| Side draws / PAs / cut points / multi-spec DOF | **MISSING in code** | Named in SCOPE/CASE only |
| Bracketing, 2×2, hydraulics, PA/side-stripper logic | **DOCS only** | Workflow §26 planned |

---

## Per-document inventory

### 1. `INTELLIGENCE_INVENTORY_V1.md`
| Bucket | Items |
|--------|--------|
| **KEEP** | Status tags (CODED/PARTIAL/DOCS); P1–P14; COM shell; States-before-knob; FINAL_TARGET ≠ Active; 1-for-1 swap; never auto Specs.Add |
| **RETARGET** | “Validate on SW Stripper”; default NH₃ 50 ppmw; `STRATEGY_CATALOG` stripper IDs; Category-1 RR→NH₃; `baseline_swap` NH₃→Ovhd |
| **REPLACE** | §6 “CDU / VDU out of product scope”; §9 “Explicitly not next: … CDU logic”; anti-complexity line “one validation on SW Stripper” as **the** gate for CDU claims; stale State F wording vs §9 |
| **MISSING** | CDU FINAL_TARGET table (ASTM/TBP/cut/gap); PA/draw families; multi-product State E; atmospheric reference case row |

### 2. `MULTI_VARIABLE_ITERATION_MAP.md`
| Bucket | Items |
|--------|--------|
| **KEEP** | State→family chooser; one family/trial; product+operability keep/reverse; Category-1 before structural F; no silent structural writes |
| **RETARGET** | Families **B/C** examples still RR/boilup/D/B — map to CDU (draw rates, PA duty/return T, top RR, steam) |
| **REPLACE** | Header claims CDU scope while knobs are simple-column only (misleading) |
| **MISSING** | Families for **side-draw rates**, **PA duty / ΔT / return**, **cut/gap specs**, **stripping steam**, multi-target residual ranking across products |

### 3. `expert_decision_workflow.md` (States A–F + variable families)
| Bucket | Items |
|--------|--------|
| **KEEP** | States **A–F** definitions; FINAL_TARGET external layer; Cat 1–3 hierarchy; response classes; recovery; State E criteria (§28.5); anti-complexity layers |
| **RETARGET** | Studio-first = SW Stripper; Appendix A/B SWS lessons; §5.7 NH₃ example; diagnosis 9.1–9.3 as OH/btms-only |
| **REPLACE** | §2 “side draws/PAs … later extensions” if product is already CDU; Appendix A “structural not in Assist” vs inventory `column_connections` CODED |
| **MISSING** | Executable CDU diagnosis: draw vs PA vs energy vs cut coupling; multi-spec DOF templates; petroleum property targets (§26 listed, not written) |

### 4. `column_convergence_playbook.md`
| Bucket | Items |
|--------|--------|
| **KEEP** | Phases A–F loop; P1–P14; COM transferability matrix; AUTO/READ/MANUAL buckets |
| **RETARGET** | Banner already says legacy stripper — keep as COM proof; copy pattern for CDU addendum |
| **REPLACE** | Entire operational content as **CDU process guidance** (RR↔NH₃ tree, Full Reflux inspect, nh3_goal_nudge ladder, worked SWS stress case) |
| **MISSING** | Atmospheric CDU playbook: multi-product inspect, PA/draw strategy IDs, cut-point residual tree |

### 5. `intelligence_improvement_notes.md`
| Bucket | Items |
|--------|--------|
| **KEEP** | Gap themes: state-first, lock FINAL_TARGET, units/stream truth, operability, going-nowhere, interactive default; “better ≠ GoalValue spam” |
| **RETARGET** | Scope line → CDU; SWS lessons as historical shell proof |
| **REPLACE** | Treating this as coded truth (inventory supersedes); Layer 2 “next” text that is partly already coded |
| **MISSING** | CDU-specific backlog (assay targets, PA families, side-stripper DOF) |

### 6. `SCOPE_CDU_ASSIST.md` / `CASE_CDU_V1_NEW_INTELLIGENCE.md` (intelligence only)
| Bucket | Items |
|--------|--------|
| **KEEP** | Product boundary (CDU ≠ simple ≠ VDU); States A–F + FINAL_TARGET + Trial Map identity; never auto-save / auto-relax / auto-Add; family table A–F in CASE §4.1 |
| **RETARGET** | Legacy SWS validation bullets (NH₃ 50 ppmw, RR≈2.5 State E) — label clearly historical |
| **REPLACE** | Claiming “already built” CDU PE if engine still SWS-default; CASE §3 still **SW Stripper as reference column** under a CDU case title |
| **MISSING** | Atmospheric reference column definition; CDU FINAL_TARGET set; which families are coded vs aspirational |

### 7. `hysys_add_spec_catalog.md`
| Bucket | Items |
|--------|--------|
| **KEEP** | Full HYSYS type list (includes Cut Point, Draw Rate, Pump Around, Gap, EP cut/gap); recommend-only policy |
| **RETARGET** | Type list is reusable for CDU |
| **REPLACE** | “When to add” table is **stripper-only**; row “Petroleum cut/gap/PA/VP — Not for this stripper” as product policy |
| **MISSING** | CDU when-to-add matrix (which Active pair per section; PA vs draw vs cut; DOF counting with many draws) |

---

## Physics still SW Stripper / simple-column

Still baked into docs/code narrative:
- Full Reflux + Ovhd Active → dry bottoms
- Dominant residual = **RR vs NH₃**
- FINAL_TARGET = **single bottoms composition**
- Operability ≈ **nonzero bottoms** (not multi-draw yields / PA return ΔT)
- Strategy IDs: `reflux_nudge_*`, `nh3_goal_nudge`, NH₃→Ovhd swap

---

## Must change for atmospheric CDU

1. **FINAL_TARGET** → multi-product (naphtha/kerosene/diesel/… ASTM D86 / TBP / cut / gap / flash), not NH₃  
2. **Variable families** → draw rates + PA duty/return + top energy + steam; RR only one of many  
3. **DOF / Active policy** → many simultaneous specs; condenser-aware swaps insufficient  
4. **Diagnosis** → section traffic / PA cooling vs draw vs cut coupling (workflow §9 is 2-end)  
5. **State E** → all product cuts + PA operability + yields, not stream NH₃ + bottoms flow  
6. **Validation gate** → atmospheric crude case, not “State E on SW Stripper”  
7. **Docs honesty** → stop claiming CDU scope while examples/heuristics/out-of-scope lines are still stripper  

**Bottom line:** Generic PE shell is reusable (**KEEP**). Nearly all examples, strategy IDs, and “when to add” (**RETARGET/REPLACE**). Side draws, PAs, cut points, multi-spec DOF (**MISSING**).
